---
title: "David Redek"
toc: false
about: 
  template: solana
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
---

Hi, I'm David, and I am a statistician in R&D at Novo Nordisk.

My current work revolves around semi-parametric causal inference and model-free, doubly robust targeted learning, with applications to clinical trials and broader healthcare data, as well as related imputation methods. Beyond biostatistics, I am interested in all areas of machine learning and enjoy exploring applications in econometrics and finance.

## Experience

**Statistician**\
Novo Nordisk A/S \| Copenhagen, Denmark\
Jan 2024 -- Present

**Research Assistant**\
University of Copenhagen \| Copenhagen, Denmark\
Nov 2021 -- Nov 2023

**Data Scientist**\
CGI Inc. \| Prague, Czech Republic\
July 2020 -- Nov 2020

**Data Engineer**\
Woodler, s.r.o. \| Brno, Czech Republic\
June 2017 -- Sep 2018

## Education

**MSc. in Statistics** \
University of Copenhagen \| Copenhagen, Denmark \
Sep 2021 -- Nov 2023

**Bc. in Mathematics** \
Charles University \| Prague, Czech Republic \
Oct 2017 -- June 2021

```{=html}
<style>
.navbar-brand {
  visibility: hidden !important;
}
</style>
```
